name: Microwave Spiced Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 2 inch thick boneless loin pork chops, trimmed of fat
1/3 cup dried bread crumbs mixed with
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub pork chops with lime juice and coat with cilantro.
2. In a microwave-safe pie plate, microwave butter and garlic for 1 1/2 minutes or until it sizzles.
3. Dip pork chops in garlic butter, then in seasoned breading. Place in the center of the pie plate.
4. Sprinkle with remaining seasoned breading and drizzle with butter.
5. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on medium high for 6 minutes.
6. Turn over and rotate the dish. Microwave, covered with waxed paper for 6 more minutes, or until the center is no longer pink.
7. Serve with salsa or lime wedges. As a side dish, serve rice mixed with corn.
Yield: 2 servings
